description: Replace First Substring is a ProtoFlux node that replaces the first occurrence of SearchFor (String) in Str (String) with ReplaceWith (String). Will only start searching after the provided StartIndex (int).

fields.Str: The string to search for SearchFor (String) in.
fields.SearchFor: The string to be replacing in Str (String).
fields.StartIndex: The point in the string to start searching from, rather than from the beginning.
fields.* ([[Type:String|String]]): Returns Str (String) with the first SearchFor (String) occurance replaced with ReplaceWith (String). But only after the point StartIndex (int) was searched after.
